name: Chipsea Technologies (shenzhen) Corp.
summary: Chipsea Technologies (shenzhen) Corp., a chip design company, focuses on the research and development of ADCs, MCUs, measurement algorithms, and one-stop solutions for the Internet of Things in China. Its products and solutions are used in smart health, pressure touch, smart home perception, industrial measurement, general-purpose microcontrollers, and other fields. The company was founded in 2003 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.
